title: Five things before 25
caption:
Your 20s are not a waiting room.

A lot of guys hit 25 with a great personality and very little built. No morning, no discipline with the body, no man who knows their real sin, no solid work ethic — and wondering why nothing feels grounded.

A godly man doesn't drift through his 20s. He builds in them.

Five disciplines worth growing now:

1. Build a morning that's yours. Word before the world gets access to you.
2. Put your sin to death — not manage it. Colossians 3:5.
3. Use your body on purpose. Hard things outside build something inside.
4. Find one man who knows the real thing you're fighting. James 5:16.
5. Show up. Finish things. Become a man people can count on.

The 20s are cheap for growth — your character is still wet concrete. Build now.

—

Comment "built" and I'll send you the link to ETHOS.
